1.premise: Ballet training explains racism and anorexia as shared institutional traits.
A sobriety tattoo fails if bartenders cannot read cursive.
Sex with fighters is like blacking out because both end in head trauma.
Cauliflower ear looks like fighters moved their brains outside.
What if pregnancy could test whether a fetus fights back.

lines.text: God, this is so exciting. Hi, hi, hi Dustin. Hi. How are we? I know some of you guys might
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: not know it. My name is Karen. I'm from Massachusetts. I was in the Boston Ballet
lines.label: setup

lines.text: for about 10 years. That's why I'm a racist anorexic. I'm kidding, I'm kidding.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I eat. I'm also an alcoholic. I have a very helpful tattoo. It says don't serve
lines.label: setup

lines.text: on my arm.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's okay, bartenders can't read cursive.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Whenever I miss blacking out,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I just sleep with an MMA guy.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Um...
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: You know, when I see a cauliflower here--
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Flood. It's not--
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's not good.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: People are so mean about MMA guys.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They're like, "They're so dumb."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, "No, their brains are just on the outside now."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'm just kidding, they're pretty dumb.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I do this thing last week, I do this thing,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I let him come at me, and then I go,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Hey, let's see if this kid's a fighter."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: What?
lines.label: fluff
